zh.Of, Ziegenhain, Hessen-Nassau, Prussia: 德國海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧可萊斯 其根海
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gozmar lll. von Ziegenhain於大約1136年出生在德國格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 薩辛-維馬-森亞賀其根海時，他的父親Gottfried von Ziegenhain I29歲，母親Frau Kirtorf Von Ziegenhain Reichenbach27歲。他和Mrs Gozmar III, Countess Of Ziegenhain至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1184年7月26日在德國賀林根艾福特艾福特享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gozmar lll. von Ziegenhain于大约1136年出生在德国格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 薩辛-維馬-森亞賀其根海时，他的父亲Gottfried von Ziegenhain I29岁，母亲Frau Kirtorf Von Ziegenhain Reichenbach27岁。他和Mrs Gozmar III, Countess Of Ziegenhain至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1184年7月26日在德国賀林根艾福特艾福特享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Gozmar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Catalan: from the ancient Germanic personal name Godomar, composed of the elements gaut, an ethnic name meaning ‘Goth’ or ‘Geat’ (see Goss ), or guth ‘god’ + mar ‘fame’.

variants.name: Goss
meanings: Short form of   Jocelyn  , also occasionally used as an independent given name. In part it may also be a revival of a medieval boy's name (  see  Joyce  ). The name is borne by the British actor  Joss Ackland  (  b. 1928 ) and the female pop singer  Joss Stone  (  b. 1987 ) as Jocelyn Eve Stoker.

nameMeanings.name: lll.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1  Sanskrit: a term of endearment, ‘darling boy’.

en.lifeSummary: When Gozmar lll. von Ziegenhain was born about 1136, in Ziegenhain, Saxe-Weimar-Eisenach, Germany, his father, Gottfried von Ziegenhain I, was 29 and his mother, Frau Kirtorf Von Ziegenhain Reichenbach, was 27. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Mrs Gozmar III, Countess Of Ziegenhain. He died on 26 July 1184, in Erfurt, Erfurt, Thuringia, Germany, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gozmar lll. von Ziegenhain est né environ 1136, à Ziegenhain, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Allemagne, son père, Gottfried von Ziegenhain I, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Frau Kirtorf Von Ziegenhain Reichenbach, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Mrs Gozmar III, Countess Of Ziegenhain. Il est décédé le 26 juillet 1184, à Erfurt, Erfurt, Thüringen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.Nassau, Deggendorf, Bayern, German: Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Gozmar lll. von Ziegenhain um 1136 in Ziegenhain, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gottfried von Ziegenhain I 29 und seine Mutter Frau Kirtorf Von Ziegenhain Reichenbach 27. Er hatte mit Mrs Gozmar III, Countess Of Ziegenhain mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 26. Juli 1184 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Erfurt, Erfurt, Thüringen, Deutschland.

Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Mrs Gozmar III, Countess Of Ziegenhain. Morì il 26 luglio 1184, nel Erfurt, Erfurt, Thüringen, Germania, all'età di 49 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Gozmar lll. von Ziegenhain(이)가 대략 1136년 독일 그로ss헤어즈그투 작센-위마-이센악h 지겐하인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gottfried von Ziegenhain I(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Frau Kirtorf Von Ziegenhain Reichenbach(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Mrs Gozmar III, Countess Of Ziegenhain(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1184년 7월 26일 독일 스u링 르퍼트 르퍼트에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gozmar lll. von Ziegenhain родился около 1136 г. в местности зиедженан, гроssхирзогтум сачсен-вимар-исенач, Германия, его отцу по имени Gottfried von Ziegenhain I было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Frau Kirtorf Von Ziegenhain Reichenbach, 27. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Mrs Gozmar III, Countess Of Ziegenhain. Он умер 26 июля 1184 г. в местности эрфурт, эрфурт, тuринген, Германия в возрасте 49 лет.
